picks.quote: I'm going to pick Drius Dublacy via knockout in this fight. That is my official prediction.
I'll make the prediction of Christian Lero Duncan via knockout. I think it's the safe prediction.
the big thing why I'm picking Chase in this fight, which I am picking Chase... I'll say that he gets the fight to the ground at some point... I'll pick him via submission.
I got for team Mlean to win this fight. I got for team Mlean to win this fight via decision
ultimately I'll pick Tommy McMillan via via knockout in this fight.
ultimately, I will pick Austin Bashi to win this fight. And I'll say that he gets it done via decision.
I still favor Co in this fight... So, I got Sukyo via decision in this fight.
right now, just for the sake of the show, I'll pick Alvin Hines via KO

I think this one is a bit of a home run for Diani Barbosa... Da Barbosa via submission is my official prediction.
